result.content: FINAL_ANSWER: F(x) = 3 n k_B T_0 x_0^2 / x^3. Re-derivation: 1. Internal Energy U = 3/2 n k_B T. 2. Adiabatic constraint: T * x^2 = C, so T(x) = T_0 * x_0^2 / x^2. 3. For a thermally isolated process where dS=0, the force is F = -dU/dx. 4. U(x) = 3/2 n k_B (T_0 * x_0^2 / x^2). 5. F = -d/dx [3/2 n k_B T_0 x_0^2 * x^-2] = - [3/2 n k_B T_0 x_0^2 * (-2 * x^-3)] = 3 n k_B T_0 x_0^2 / x^3.
